issues.title: Project list targets wrong template — view_board.html has no empty state
issues.attack: Plan targets view_board.html which uses status_groups and has no global empty state. Actual empty states are in view_list.html and view_table.html.
issues.response: Correct. File Map must target view_list.html and view_table.html. Board view always shows columns by design.

issues.title: Dashboard empty state logic is infeasible
issues.attack: Dashboard is composed of independent partials each with own empty state. Condition {% if not today_actions and not weekly_schedule %} conflates no-tasks with no-projects.
issues.response: Remove dashboard step from scope or use per-partial approach with existing is_owner variable.

issues.title: Header + 등록 buttons visible to consultants
issues.attack: project_list.html and client_list.html show + 등록 button to all roles, contradicting empty state CTA logic.
issues.response: Wrap header buttons in owner role check. project_create permission issue noted but out of t09 scope.

issues.title: Design spec requires 5 screens, plan covers only 3
issues.attack: Contact tab and submission tab empty states are omitted from the plan despite being in the design spec.
issues.response: Add tab_contacts.html and tab_submissions.html to File Map with updated text per spec.

issues.title: Client list plan breaks search-empty vs data-empty distinction
issues.attack: Plan uses {% if not clients %} but actual template uses page_obj and q to distinguish search-empty from data-empty.
issues.response: Preserve existing page_obj/q branching. Add role CTA only in not-q branch.

issues.title: CTA markup lacks HTMX attributes, uses hardcoded URLs
issues.attack: Plan's CTA links missing hx-get, hx-target, hx-push-url. Dashboard step hardcodes /clients/ URL.
issues.response: All CTAs must include HTMX attributes and use {% url %} tags.

issues.title: Dashboard uses membership.role instead of existing is_owner pattern
issues.attack: Dashboard already uses is_owner boolean. Plan introduces inconsistent membership.role check.
issues.response: Subsumed by Issue 2. Use is_owner if dashboard modifications are kept.
